deploy.startCommand: sh -lc 'echo "[runtime-env] analytics env present: ga=${VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID:+yes} meta=${VITE_META_PIXEL_ID:+yes} whatsapp=${VITE_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER:+yes}" && find dist -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.css" \) -exec sed -i "s|__VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID__|${VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID}|g;s|__VITE_META_PIXEL_ID__|${VITE_META_PIXEL_ID}|g;s|__VITE_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER__|${VITE_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER}|g" {} + && serve -s dist --single -l ${PORT:-3000}'
